title: Happy Shiu's Extended Enchantment Levels
description:
Adds More Roman Numberals like XI, XII...
Also 11, 12...
body:
So i Made this resource pack for this reason: too bored

This Resource Pack adds more enchantment levels, also no "enchantment.level.[numbers tho]"!


<details>
<summary>What does "C" Roman Number Means?</summary>

"C" Does Means 100, if you add 1 more "C", they will become "CC",   
"CC" means 200.

</details>
Idea Resources from: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extended-enchantment-numerals
